render-mode.text:
Your GrowERP subscription payment failed

Hello ${firstName!''},

We tried to renew your GrowERP subscription but the payment could not be processed. Your subscription expires on ${expiryDate!''}.

We will retry daily during the grace period. To keep access to your system, please log in to GrowERP and update your payment details — you will be asked for them automatically when the subscription expires.

Questions? Just reply to this email.

The GrowERP team
